message:
chore(beads): file copycp (copy.copy shares graph attrs divergence)

Minor semantics divergence: nx `copy.copy(G)` shares G.graph dict
reference; fnx's __copy__ returns independent dicts. Queued as LOW —
user-visible but not functional, and fnx's isolation is arguably
safer. Fix requires careful reference sharing design.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
